_review: DRAFT — NEEDS NATIVE INDONESIAN REVIEW before pushing. Religious-adjacent copy (the salaam in joinPrefill, askDialogSubtitle mentioning fatwas/scholars, 'Allah knows best') is highest-risk and must be checked by a native speaker. en.json is the source of truth.
